title: rubia argyi var. pubescens
intro: Rubia argyi var. pubescens, also known as the Chinese red root or red root, is a variety of the Rubia argyi plant, a species of flowering plant in the madder family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of anthraquinones, which have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for their anti-inflammatory and astringent properties. The health benefits of Rubia argyi var. pubescens include the treatment of diarrhea, dysentery, and other gastrointestinal issues, as well as its use in skincare products to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, Rubia argyi var. pubescens is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be dried and made into capsules or powder for oral consumption.
